summary: Verified fix for Teacher role Student Report page crash (TypeError: argument of type 'coroutine' is not iterable). All backend report APIs return 200 for teacher role. Frontend Student Report page loads filters correctly without errors.
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: Async endpoint renamed from 'get_user_permissions' to 'get_user_permissions_endpoint_v2' at line 7690
Sync helper function 'get_user_permissions' at line 385 no longer shadowed
has_permission() at line 389 now correctly receives a list (not coroutine)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Student Report page loads correctly for teacher)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher role report access bug is fixed. The async endpoint function at line 7690 was renamed from 'get_user_permissions' to 'get_user_permissions_endpoint_v2' to prevent shadowing the sync helper function at line 385. All report APIs (student, attendance-overview, daily, absent-students) now work for teacher role.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Function name collision - async endpoint 'get_user_permissions' at line 7690 was shadowing sync helper function 'get_user_permissions' at line 385
rca_of_the_issue.error_message: TypeError: argument of type 'coroutine' is not iterable
rca_of_the_issue.affected_code: has_permission() function at line 389-394 which calls get_user_permissions()
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 10 backend tests pass, frontend Student Report page loads correctly for teacher

backend_api_tests.admin_student_report: PASS - Admin can still access all reports
backend_api_tests.teacher_permissions: PASS - Teacher has correct permissions in user object

frontend_tests.teacher_login_ui: PASS - Teacher can login via UI
frontend_tests.filters_loaded: PASS - Department, Course, Student dropdowns populated
frontend_tests.no_errors: PASS - No error messages on page
